description.value:
Oath-plates sworn before a longhouse fire — in Jötun tradition, promised armor is forged in ceremony rather than silence; the vow spoken binds the metal against compulsion, and the plates remember.

Effect: Once per encounter, when you would be force moved, reduce the forced movement distance by 2 squares (to a minimum of 0).

Rules: Forced Movement; Squares; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least quality craft; an oath-copper coin from a Jötun ceremony
project.source: Oath-plates sworn before a longhouse fire (Jötuntunga)
